name: CBLOCK4
description: C-code block for custom continuous dynamics (4 continuous states)
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="CBLOCK4" blockType="c" dependsOnU="1" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName=" " simulationFunctionType="DYNAMIC_EXPLICIT_4" style="CBLOCK4">
  <Array as="exprs" scilabClass="ScilabList">
    <ScilabString height="19" width="1">
      <data line="0" column="0" value="toto"/>
      <data line="1" column="0" value="n"/>
      <data line="2" column="0" value="[1,1]"/>
      <data line="3" column="0" value="1"/>
      <data line="4" column="0" value="[1,1]"/>
      <data line="5" column="0" value="1"/>
      <data line="6" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="7" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="8" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="9" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="10" column="0" value="list()"/>
      <data line="11" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="12" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="13" column="0" value="list()"/>
      <data line="14" column="0" value="0"/>
      <data line="15" column="0" value="0"/>
      <data line="16" column="0" value="[]"/>
      <data line="17" column="0" value="y"/>
      <data line="18" column="0" value="n"/>
    </ScilabString>
    <ScilabDouble height="0" width="0"/>
  </Array>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="300.0" y="200.0" width="80.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: exprs contains ScilabList with nested ScilabString + ScilabDouble
Uses list() syntax in exprs[10] and exprs[13]
Empty realParameters/integerParameters but accepts matrix expressions like [1,1]
criticalRules: Special list() syntax for empty Scilab lists
Matrix expressions like [1,1] stored as strings
19 configuration parameters for advanced C blocks
